JUDGE LITTLE, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C/ FOR TRIAL, PLTF PRESENT W/ COUNSEL, DEFT NOT PRESENT, BUT SISTER, DARETH TYREE PRESENT AND INDICATED TO COURT THAT DEFT IS ILL. TRIAL CONT'D TO 12/29/97 WITH DEFT TO BRING PROOF OF ILLNESS. DEFT'S COUNSEL ROSALIE DAVIS RELIEVED AND DISCHARGED AS ATTY OF RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT, BARBARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 633 OAK STREET, #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,819.72 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $30.84 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.56, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COSTS BILL, $30.84 = HOLD OVER FEE. EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT STAYED UNTIL 1/6/98. IF DEFT PAYS PLTF/AGENT $2380 BY CERTIFIED CHECK OR CASH, STAY SHALL BE PERMANENT. IF $2380 IS NOT PAID, THE STAY OF JUDGMENT IS DISSOLVED 1/7/98.
